title: Login PRD
subtitle: Iterative clarity flow
context: Page 1 only decides the entry path. The agent will generate the next page after reading this page result.

decisions.question: Which auth methods should v1 support?
decisions.recommendation_reason: The spec emphasizes low friction for a first-party B2C flow, so magic link is the narrowest first page default.

options.label: Magic link only
options.reason: Lowest friction and smallest first-release surface.

options.label: Password plus magic link
options.description: Users can sign in either way.
options.reason: Only worth it if password accounts are explicitly required.
